prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Black-Scholes-Merton inspired model, assuming a log-normal distribution for future prices. The current price of $122.91 is used as the starting point. An estimated annualized volatility of 20% and an average daily log return (drift) of 0.02% were applied over a 6-day period. The point estimate represents the mean of the projected price, while the confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of daily log returns over the specified timeframe.
